meta.title: PromoClock — Claude Peak Hours Tracker
meta.description: Know instantly when Claude's session limits drain faster. Real-time peak hours status for your timezone — Free, Pro, Max & Team. No setup needed.
meta.ogTitle: PromoClock — Are Claude's limits draining faster right now?
meta.ogDescription: Stop guessing. PromoClock shows instantly whether you're in Claude's peak hours, when session limits drain faster than usual.

hero.activeSubtitle: Off-peak hours — session limits drain at normal speed. Best time for token-intensive work.
hero.inactiveSubtitle: Peak hours (weekdays 1pm–7pm UTC) — session limits drain faster than usual. Weekly limits unchanged.
hero.expiredSubtitle: Off-peak hours — session limits drain at normal speed. Best time for token-intensive work.
hero.notStartedSubtitle: Off-peak hours — session limits drain at normal speed. Best time for token-intensive work.

howItWorks.title: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.subtitle: We keep it simple so you can focus on what matters — building with Claude.

steps.title: WE DETECT YOUR TIMEZONE
steps.description: The moment you open PromoClock, we read your device's timezone automatically. No setup, no configuration needed.

steps.title: WE CALCULATE IN REAL TIME
steps.description: Our engine compares your local time against Claude's peak hours (weekdays 1 PM – 7 PM UTC) in real-time.

steps.title: YOU SEE YOUR STATUS INSTANTLY
steps.description: A clear, real-time display tells you whether you're in peak hours (limits drain faster) or off-peak (normal speed) — plus a countdown to the next change.

eligibility.title: WHO'S AFFECTED
eligibility.subtitle: Session limit adjustments apply to all Claude subscription tiers.

plans.name: Free
plans.description: Session limits move faster during peak hours. Shift token-intensive work to off-peak hours to maximize your weekly limits.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: ~7% of Pro users may hit session limits they wouldn't have before. Off-peak hours are best for heavy workloads.

plans.name: Max
plans.description: Session limits move faster during peak hours. Schedule autonomous agents and data processing for off-peak hours.

plans.name: Team
plans.description: Team workspaces are affected. Coordinate with your team to schedule heavy workloads during off-peak hours.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: Enterprise plans have dedicated capacity and custom contracts, so they are not affected by these session limit adjustments.

eligibility.note: Weekly limits remain unchanged. During peak hours (weekdays 1pm–7pm UTC), session limits drain faster than usual. No known end date for this adjustment.

schedule.title: GLOBAL SCHEDULE
schedule.subtitle: See when peak hours occur in major cities. During peak hours, session limits drain faster than normal. Peak: weekdays 1pm–7pm UTC.

faq.title: QUESTIONS ANSWERED
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Claude's session limits system.

items.question: What changed with Claude's session limits?
items.answer: Starting March 27, 2026, Claude adjusts how session limits drain during peak hours. During peak hours (weekdays 1pm–7pm UTC), session limits drain faster than usual. Outside peak hours — weekday evenings, nights, and all weekend — limits drain at normal speed. Weekly limits remain unchanged. No known end date for this adjustment.

items.question: When exactly are peak hours?
items.answer: Peak hours are weekdays 1:00 PM to 7:00 PM UTC. Weekday evenings, nights, and the entire weekend are off-peak — limits drain at normal speed during these times.

items.question: What time are peak hours in my timezone?
items.answer: PromoClock automatically detects your device timezone and shows your exact local peak and off-peak windows. The hero section at the top of this page displays your current status in real time.

items.question: Which Claude plans are affected?
items.answer: Free, Pro, Max, and Team plans are all affected. Enterprise plans are not affected because they have dedicated capacity and custom contracts.

items.question: Do my weekly limits change?
items.answer: No. Your weekly limits remain exactly the same. Only the rate at which you move through your 5-hour session limits during peak hours has changed. ~7% of users (particularly Pro tier) may hit session limits they wouldn't have before.

items.question: How can I maximize my session limits?
items.answer: Shift token-intensive background jobs and heavy workloads to off-peak hours (weekday evenings/nights and all weekend). Session limits drain at normal speed during off-peak hours — you get more out of your usage.

items.question: On which platforms does this apply?
items.answer: Session limit adjustments apply across all Claude surfaces: the web interface at claude.ai, desktop apps (Mac and Windows), mobile apps (iOS and Android), Claude Cowork, Claude Code (terminal), and the Excel and PowerPoint add-ins.

items.question: What happened to the March 2026 promotion?
items.answer: The Claude March 2026 off-peak promotion (2x limits) ran from March 13–27, 2026 and ended. The current peak hours system (limits drain faster during peak hours) took effect on March 27, 2026. See the archive section below.

items.question: What is PromoClock and who built it?
items.answer: PromoClock was built by Onur Şendere (@onursendere on X) to help Claude users worldwide instantly understand whether they are in peak hours. It is an independent project and is not affiliated with Anthropic.

devTools.title: DEVELOPER TOOLS
devTools.subtitle: Integrate Claude's peak hours status into your workflow. API endpoint and terminal prompt — no browser needed.
devTools.apiDescription: A public /api/status endpoint returns real-time peak hours status as JSON. Pipe it into your ZSH/Bash prompt to see your current status right in your terminal.
devTools.notifDescription: Enable the bell icon in the header to receive a browser notification and a gentle chime the instant Claude switches to off-peak mode — when session limits return to normal speed.
